theme_and_archetype.rationale: The audience is sophisticated Chinese-American parents looking for K-12 to Ivy League consulting. They evaluate Ivy-League-level brands. The design must eschew generic SaaS aesthetics in favor of a classical, editorial, highly trustworthy, and prestigious layout. We blend classical Western serif typography with elegant Chinese Serif to create an 'artistic' (艺术) and 'academic' (学院风) visual language resembling high-end literary magazines or Ivy League prospectuses.

primary_heading.description: Used for all massive hero text and major section headers. It must feature tight tracking (tracking-tighter) and elegant weights (light or regular, NOT bold by default).

body.description: For editorial paragraphs and storytelling elements.

utility_and_small_caps.description: Used for contrast: navigation links, overlines (tracking-widest uppercase), numbers, and data points. This provides the 'modern structural' balance to the classical serif.

rules: No Inter, Roboto, or generic sans-serif for headings.
Bilingual typography is a feature: Ensure English and Chinese strings are styled seamlessly together.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase, Tiny (text-xs), and Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line Height: leading-none for H1, leading-relaxed for body.

background.name: Warm Ivory / Paper
background.description: Main page background to simulate high-quality editorial paper.

surface.name: Tinted Alabaster
surface.description: Used for subtle differentiation in bento boxes or story cards.

text.name: Deep Oxford Navy / Ink
text.description: Almost black with a hint of navy for classical depth.

text_muted.name: Graphite
text_muted.description: For secondary text, small caps, and subtle metadata.

accent.name: Academic Crimson
accent.description: Used SPARINGLY for hairline borders, critical numbers, or subtle hover states.

border.name: Warm Ash
border.description: Used for the mandatory hairline editorial rules (1px solid borders) dividing sections.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Asymmetrical Editorial Grid. Avoid perfectly balanced columns. Mix 4-col and 8-col spans.
spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Extremely generous. Sections should be padded with py-24 or py-32. Elements within a bento or column should use p-8 or p-12.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use border-t, border-b, and border-r (border-collapse style) with the Warm Ash color to create structured, newspaper-like subdivisions.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align almost everything to respect the editorial origin. Only center-align if it is a singular poetic quote.

buttons.primary: Solid Deep Oxford Navy background, Warm Ivory text, sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). Chivo font, uppercase, tracking-wider, text-xs. On hover: background shifts to Academic Crimson.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px border of Deep Oxford Navy, Oxford Navy text. On hover: subtle Tinted Alabaster background.

cards.style: Flat, sharp corners. NO soft drop shadows. If depth is needed, use a sharp 1px offset shadow or rely entirely on hairline borders (border border-border/40) for structure.

top_nav.layout: Solid ivory background with a strict 1px bottom hairline border. Logo (Supernova Education) on the left (Cormorant Garamond, italic). Links in the center (Chivo, text-xs, uppercase, wide tracking). 'Schedule a Conversation' button on the right.

hero.layout: Massive left-aligned typography. English in Cormorant, Chinese seamlessly flowing. 'Growth Mindset. Clear Goals. Consistent Effort. 成长思维，清晰目标，持续努力'. Below it, a narrower column (col-span-1 md:col-span-5) of the descriptive subhead in English/Chinese.
hero.visual: Right side or background incorporates the 'hero_ink_wash' image abstractly. Avoid full dark overlays. If using as a side image, wrap it in a sharp border.
hero.cta: Primary CTA button 'Schedule a Conversation 预约诊断式对话' + secondary text 'No sales pitch' underneath in Chivo italic text-xs.

stats_strip.layout: 4-column grid (border-collapse style with vertical hairline dividers border-r). Each cell has generous padding (p-8).
stats_strip.typography: The number itself is massive (text-5xl) in Cormorant or Chivo Light, accented in Academic Crimson. The label is text-xs uppercase Chivo.

track_record.layout: Editorial honor roll. 'Ivy League Class of 2026' heading. Below, a 2-column or 3-column masonry list. Each item has student initials, major, and a short note (e.g., 'J.L. — Applied Mathematics, Harvard').
track_record.visual: A classic photo (track_record_img_1) can be placed asymmetrically to break up the text list, resembling a magazine spread.

three_pillars.layout: 'Three Things We Believe'. 3-column bento/grid layout. Top border on the whole section.
three_pillars.details: Each pillar gets a massive '01', '02', '03' in Cormorant Light (text-6xl+). The titles are bilingual. Left-aligned, heavy spacing.

student_stories.layout: 3-4 case study cards in an asymmetrical layout. Some cards span 2 columns, some span 1.
student_stories.card_design: School name (e.g., 'Columbia ED') as a small-caps overline. Narrative paragraph in Cormorant. Outcome in bold. Image (student_stories_1) integrated into one of the featured cards.

manifesto.layout: Full-bleed or massive container holding the 'manifesto_archway' B&W image. Text overlay: 'A practice, not a firm — We take 20 to 30 families at a time'.
manifesto.overlay: bg-black/40 with white text. Cormorant Garamond italic. Extremely cinematic and exclusive.

footer.layout: Closing CTA 'Start with a diagnostic conversation 从一次诊断式对话开始' massive in the center. Below, grid for Livingston NJ, email, phone, WeChat. Hairline top border.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Chivo, Cormorant Garamond, and Noto Serif SC from Google Fonts.
Implement the Warm Ivory background and Oxford Navy text globally.
Avoid Shadcn rounded cards; use sharp, flat DIVs with hairline borders (border-collapse style).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Treat bilingual text as an art form: respect line heights and spacing.
Do not use generic UI components. Build raw HTML/Tailwind for the asymmetrical editorial sections.
Use all provided media URLs. No placeholders are allowed.
